overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a rural mountain road before turning onto a dirt hiking trail. The clip features clear sunny weather, occasional passing vehicles, and a transition from paved roadside to natural terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural highway shoulder with passing traffic

events.description: red sports car drives past on the paved road to the right
black sedan drives past on the paved road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder parallel to the paved road

notable_agents.action: red sports car speeding past on the road
black sedan driving past on the road

entered.detail: asphalt road running parallel to the walking path
steep rocky terrain with sparse bushes on the left side
steep rocky cliff face on the right side of the road
utility poles with wires running along the road
tall green trees lining the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt shoulder beside a paved rural highway, flanked by rocky hillsides and scattered trees. The weather is sunny and clear. A red sports car and later a black sedan pass by on the road to the right.

events.description: character passes the no parking sign and begins crossing toward the road
white sedan drives past as the character approaches the road edge
character leaves the paved road and enters the dirt trail heading uphill into the hills

agents.ego_description: passing the no parking sign, briefly stepping onto the paved road, then turning onto the dirt trail

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past on the road
black convertible driving past on the road

entered.detail: red and white sign on a metal pole reading NO PARKING ANY TIME
unpaved hiking path branching off from the main road

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a NO PARKING sign, crosses briefly onto the paved road while cars pass by, then turns right onto a dirt trail leading uphill. The rocky hillside becomes more prominent as the road falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt hiking trail through rocky hills

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill along the narrow dirt trail away from the road

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with exposed stone and sparse vegetation
tall white and yellow wildflowers growing beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the winding dirt trail into the hills, leaving the paved road and power lines behind. The path is flanked by a rocky cliff on the right and dense trees on the left, with wildflowers growing along the trail edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a paved rural highway into a secluded, ascending mountain trail. It begins with the character walking along a dirt shoulder beside a highway, where a red sports car and a black sedan pass by against a backdrop of rocky hills and clear skies. As the character passes a no parking sign, the camera follows them briefly across the pavement before turning right onto a dirt path that leads away from the road. The scene then shifts as the character climbs higher into the hills, leaving the power lines and traffic behind. Finally, the environment opens into a winding ascent flanked by a steep rocky cliff on one side and dense trees and wildflowers on the other.
